# Confidence Report: [FEATURE NAME]

**Feature**: [Link to spec.md]
**Created**: [DATE]
**Status**: In progress | Highly confident | Residual risk accepted

**Note**: This report is generated by the `/speckit-confidence` command. It scores implementation
confidence across three axes (Accuracy, Complexity, Performance) on a 1–5 scale (5 = Highly Confident),
plus this feature's own re-compiled effort checks (`confidence-checks.md`, pass/fail, `in_authority`/`escalate`),
and records the reflect-and-loop history. Max iterations: 3.

<!--
  ============================================================================
  IMPORTANT: Append ONE "Iteration N" block per loop. Never overwrite prior
  iterations — the history is the value. Fill "Final Decision" on the last pass.
  Scale: 1 Very Low · 2 Low · 3 Moderate · 4 High · 5 Highly Confident.
  Complexity is INVERTED: over-engineering / excess code LOWERS the score.
  ============================================================================
-->

## Scoreboard

| Iteration | Accuracy | Complexity | Performance | Effort Checks (in_authority pass/total) | Gates (lint/test) | Decision |
|-----------|----------|------------|-------------|------------------------------------------|---------------------|----------|
| 1         | [1-5]    | [1-5]      | [1-5]       | [x/y]                                    | [pass/fail]         | [loop/exit/escape] |

## Iteration 1

**Scores**: Accuracy [1-5] · Complexity [1-5] · Performance [1-5]
**Quality gates**: `{LINT_CMD}` [pass/fail] · `{TEST_CMD}` [pass/fail]

### Effort checks (re-compiled from confidence-checks.md)

| ID | Axis | Authority | Result | Note |
|----|------|-----------|--------|------|
| CC-00N | [Accuracy/Complexity/Performance] | in_authority \| escalate | pass/fail | [orphaned/dropped, diff-derived addition, or normal evidence check] |

`escalate`-tagged checks are recorded as residual risk immediately below and never enter the loop-back table.

### Findings (least-confident items)

| # | Axis | Location | Why (weak/risky/over-built) | Severity | What would raise confidence | Loop-back target |
|---|------|----------|-----------------------------|----------|-----------------------------|------------------|

- [Phase looped back to + what was changed, e.g., "Re-plan: dropped unused strategy registry; re-implement: deleted 60 lines."]
